# Accounting Core Module

Module ID: accounting-core
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped double-entry accounting foundation with setup settings, chart of accounts, fiscal periods, balanced posting, voiding, and trial balance.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
Owned tables: accounting_accounts, accounting_settings, accounting_fiscal_periods, accounting_journal_entries, accounting_journal_lines, domain_events
Primary use cases: createAccount, listAccounts, updateAccountingSettings, createFiscalPeriod, closeFiscalPeriod, reopenFiscalPeriod, lockFiscalPeriod, updateFiscalPeriodStatus, getFiscalPeriod, listFiscalPeriods, createJournalEntry, updateJournalEntry, postJournalEntry, voidJournalEntry, getTrialBalance, getGeneralLedger
Invariants: tenant-scoped records, accounting settings persist standard/base currency/fiscal-year start/default AR/AP/income accounts, GAAP/IFRS chart seed packs normalize base currency and auto-map default AR/AP/income accounts, default account settings must reference same-tenant active non-header accounts with compatible account types, integer cents, balanced journals, immutable posted entries, fiscal periods carry periodType month|quarter|year|custom and close actor metadata, compare-and-set fiscal-period writes reject stale close/reopen/lock attempts, fiscal periods transition open->closed, closed->open, or closed->locked only, locked periods cannot transition, closed/locked periods reject posting, posted sourceRef uniqueness, voids create reversal metadata and a posted reversal entry instead of deleting lines, general ledger entries use posted/void journal lines and account-normal running balances.
